name: Republic assault
description:
You, a member of the Republic military are assisting in the landing phase of a Republic assault during the last years of the clone wars

You will be partaking in the second battle of Felucia along side generals Anakin Skywalker and Plo Koon and their units from the 501st legion and 104th battalion

  1. You are a unspecified soldier in a LAAT/I gunship departing towards the surface

  2. You are a pilot in a squadron defending the gunships

  3. Your gunship was struck by a enemy starfighter during the blockade run
creator: Average_roleplay_enjoyer
